name: Simple Chop Suey
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the bamboo shoots and bean sprouts.
2. Remove as many of the green pods from the vegetables as possible.
3. Heat the sunflower oil in a wok.
4. Crush the garlic into the hot oil.
5. Add the onion and carrots to the wok. Stir-fry for a few minutes, or until the onion has softened slightly.
6. Stir in the bamboo shoots and cook for an additional minute.
7. Add the bean sprouts and continue cooking for another minute.
8. Stir in the soy sauce.
9. Serve immediately.
